title: koeleria uniflora
intro: Koeleria uniflora, also known as June grass or single-flowered Koeleria, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae, native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Koeleria uniflora include its ability to soothe and calm the respiratory system, reduce inflammation, and ease congestion. Koeleria uniflora can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and it is also used in traditional medicine as a tincture or in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
